you lower the cost to 2 -> play one of them and discard the others -> at least one (or you can play the original if you have enough arith and discard both copies) stays in the discard pile (it doesn’t disappear like fleeting cards normally do when you leave them in your hand) -> next time you ult you have a higher chance to draw your nuke AND it saves you 2 arith 
and then you can either go for 1 costs or 4 again
